title: LuckyCobble
description: This mod adds LuckyBlocks to cobblemon mod
body:
# WHAT LUCKYCOBBLE DOES ?
LuckyCobble Adds LuckyBlocks that contain random pokemon 

# WHAT ARE POKEMON LEVELS?

- OLDS VERSION: depending on the version they can be level 1 or 100, soon we will try to make the level also random
  
- NEW VERSIONS: The Level of the pokemon is completely random
# HOW THE MOD WORK?

- When you break one of these Lucky Blocks or right click on them a random pokemon will appear
  ![How CobbleLucky works](https://i.imgur.com/KcyyBIV.gif)
# HOW I GET A LUCKY BLOCK?
- You can get these LuckyBlocks by crafting them or finding it on structures (only normal and item luckycobble)
# WHAT TYPES OR LUCKYBLOCKS ARE?
- LuckyCobble: summon a random pokemon
- LuckyCobble Item: drop a random item
- Legendary LuckyCobble: summon a random legendary
- Ultrabeast LuckyCobble: summon a random ultra beast
- Mega LuckyCobble: summon a random megapokemon with it held item (megastone)
  
# WHAT MODS I NEED?
- This mod is an addition for cobblemon so you will need to have the mod to use it
  


# CREDITS
I want to thank all the addon creators who have allowed me to use their models and made the mod process easier for me.
- [MissingMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon)
- [CobbleCats](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobble-cats)
- [CavsCobblemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cavscobblemons)
- [Overgrown's Cobblemon: Darkrai](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-darkrai)
- [The Jewel Pokémon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-jewel-pokmon-cobblemon)
- [Pokemans](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-pokemans)
- [AshiMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ashimons)
- [Hydro Reanimodel Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hydro-reanimodel-pack)
- [Synthetic Pokemon Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/synthetic-pokemon-pack)
- [MysticMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mysticmons)


Also i want to thank all the modders who have allowed me to use their mods to add new luckys
- [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)
